description: Triggers for extracting clean Markdown content from web page URLs using Defuddle

queries.query: Read this page for me: https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/about-claude/models
Fetch the content of https://martinfowler.com/articles/microservices.html
Extract this URL and give me the article: https://blog.example.com/post
Save this documentation page to a file: https://docs.fastapi.tiangolo.com
What does this page say? https://openai.com/research/gpt-4
Get the content from this website and clean it up: https://example.com/article
Read these three URLs for my research session: [list of URLs]
Fetch this webpage without all the navigation noise: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=123
Can you read this article for me? https://medium.com/some-post
Extract this documentation page as clean Markdown and save it locally: https://docs.python.org/3/library/json.html
Summarize this YouTube video: https://youtube.com/watch?v=abc123
Convert this PDF to Markdown: /path/to/document.pdf
Transcribe this audio file: meeting.mp3
Search the web for information about LLMs and summarize findings
Read the README.md file in this repository
Open this local file and summarize it: notes/research.md
Download and convert this PDF: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2303.08774.pdf
Help me write a blog post about microservices architecture
Translate this paragraph from Portuguese to English
Create a Mermaid diagram from this process description
